ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the movie belongs to */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the movie */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie in millions */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the rating belongs to */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform providing the rating */,
  "raw_score" REAL /* Raw score from the platform */,
  "normalized_score" REAL /* Normalized score (0-5 scale) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., critic, audience) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Rating scale used by the platform (e.g., 0-100, 0-10) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, marketing) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score given by the user (0-5 scale) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the user rated the movie */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the user rating record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the user rating record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Score given by the user (0-5 scale) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the review record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the review record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was written */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the role record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date when the user-role record was created */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the user-role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
